name: maggic-mlp-fs
title: MAGGIC-MLP Features
description: Set of extracted features for MAGGIC-MLP

entity.name: pid
entity.description: A unique identifier assigned to each patient in the cohort.

sampling.description: Set the period to zero to execute the feature set at a random time between the eligibility event and exit times.

feature.name: gender
feature.description: Gender of the patient

feature.name: age
feature.description: Age of the patient at reference point

feature.name: birthYear
feature.description: Birth year of the patient.

feature.name: nyha
feature.description: The latest value of the New York Heart Assessment as LOINC Code

feature.name: value
feature.description: The average value recorded over the three years preceding the reference time point.

feature.name: value
feature.description: The average value recorded over the three years preceding the reference time point.

feature.name: value
feature.description: The average value recorded over the three years preceding the reference time point.

feature.name: value
feature.description: The average value recorded over the three years preceding the reference time point.

filter.name: heart_failure
filter.filter: icd10Codes.select($this.startsWith('I50') or $this.startsWith('I11.0') or $this.startsWith('I13.0') or $this.startsWith('I13.2') or $this.startsWith('I26.0') or $this.startsWith('I25.5') or $this.startsWith('I09.81') or $this.startsWith('I97.13')).anyTrue()

feature.name: occurred_prior_to_18_months
feature.description: Indicates whether the condition was diagnosed 18 months or more before the reference time point, corresponding to the criteria for 'Heart Failure (HF) ≥ 18 Months Prior.'

feature.name: has_chronic_obstructive_pulmonary_disease
feature.description: Whether the patient has the Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD).

feature.name: has_diabetes
feature.description: Whether the patient has the diabetes.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this.startsWith('E08') or $this.startsWith('E10') or $this.startsWith('E11') or $this.startsWith('E12') or $this.startsWith('E13') or $this.startsWith('E14')).anyTrue()

feature.name: has_acute_renal_failure
feature.description: Whether the patient has acute renal failure.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'N17' or $this = 'N17.1' or $this = 'N17.2' or $this = 'N17.3' or $this = 'N17.4' or $this = 'N17.5' or $this = 'N17.6'  or $this = 'N17.7' or $this = 'N17.8' or $this = 'N17.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_pneumonia
feature.description: Whether the patient has pneumonia.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'J18' or $this = 'J18.1' or $this = 'J18.2' or $this = 'J18.3' or $this = 'J18.4' or $this = 'J18.5' or $this = 'J18.6'  or $this = 'J18.7' or $this = 'J18.8' or $this = 'J18.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_cardiac_arrest
feature.description: Whether the patient has cardiac arrest.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'I46' or $this = 'I46.1' or $this = 'I46.2' or $this = 'I46.3' or $this = 'I46.4' or $this = 'I46.5' or $this = 'I46.6'  or $this = 'I46.7' or $this = 'I46.8' or $this = 'I46.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_respiratory_failure
feature.description: Whether the patient has respiratory failure.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'J96' or $this = 'J96.1' or $this = 'J96.2' or $this = 'J96.3' or $this = 'J96.4' or $this = 'J96.5' or $this = 'J96.6'  or $this = 'J96.7' or $this = 'J96.8' or $this = 'J96.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_cancer_malignant_neoplasm_lung
feature.description: Whether the patient has malignant neoplasm, lung cancer.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'C34' or $this = 'C34.1' or $this = 'C34.2' or $this = 'C34.3' or $this = 'C34.4' or $this = 'C34.5' or $this = 'C34.6' or $this = 'C34.7' or $this = 'C34.8' or $this = 'C34.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_cancer_secondary_malignant_neoplasm_lung
feature.description: Whether the patient has secondary malignant neoplasm, lung cancer.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'C78' or $this = 'C78.1' or $this = 'C78.2' or $this = 'C78.3' or $this = 'C78.4' or $this = 'C78.5' or $this = 'C78.6' or $this = 'C78.7' or $this = 'C78.8' or $this = 'C78.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: has_cancer_secondary_malignant_neoplasm_bone_marrow
feature.description: Whether the patient has secondary malignant neoplasm, bone marrow cancer.

value.path: icd10Codes.select($this = 'C79' or $this = 'C79.1' or $this = 'C79.2' or $this = 'C79.3' or $this = 'C79.4' or $this = 'C79.5' or $this = 'C79.6' or $this = 'C79.7' or $this = 'C79.8' or $this = 'C79.9').anyTrue()

feature.name: beta_blocker_use
feature.description: Whether the patient has been prescribed beta-blocker medication before the reference time point.

value.path: medicationGroups.select($this = 'BB').anyTrue() or (medicationCodes.select($this.startsWith('C07AA') or $this.startsWith('C07AB') or $this.startsWith('C07AG') or $this.startsWith('C07BA') or $this.startsWith('C07BB') or $this.startsWith('C07BG') or $this.startsWith('C07CA') or $this.startsWith('C07CB') or $this.startsWith('C07CG') or $this.startsWith('C07DA') or $this.startsWith('C07DB') or $this.startsWith('C07DG') or $this.startsWith('C07FB') or $this.startsWith('C07FX')).anyTrue())

feature.name: ace_inhibitors_arb_use
feature.description: Whether the patient has been prescribed ACE Inhibitors / ARB medication before the reference time point.

value.path: medicationGroups.select($this = 'ACEI' or $this = 'ARB').anyTrue() or (medicationCodes.select($this.startsWith('C09AA') or $this.startsWith('C09BA') or $this.startsWith('C09BB02') or $this.startsWith('C09BB03') or $this.startsWith('C09BB04') or $this.startsWith('C09BB05') or $this.startsWith('C09BB06') or $this.startsWith('C09BB07') or $this.startsWith('C09BB08') or $this.startsWith('C09BB09') or $this.startsWith('C09BB010') or $this.startsWith('C09BB011') or $this.startsWith('C09BB012') or $this.startsWith('C09BX01') or $this.startsWith('C09BX02') or $this.startsWith('C09BX03') or $this.startsWith('C09BX04') or $this.startsWith('C09BX05') or $this.startsWith('C09CA') or $this.startsWith('C09DA') or $this.startsWith('C09DB') or $this.startsWith('C09DX01') or $this.startsWith('C09DX02') or $this.startsWith('C09DX03') or $this.startsWith('C09DX04') or $this.startsWith('C09DX05') or $this.startsWith('C09DX06') or $this.startsWith('C09DX07')).anyTrue())

feature.name: anti_diabetics_use
feature.description: Whether the patient has been prescribed Anti Diabetics medication before the reference time point.

feature.name: lvef
feature.description: The most recent left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) recorded prior to the reference time point.

feature.name: smoker
feature.description: Indicates whether the patient's most recent recorded smoking status, collected before the reference time point, classifies them as a current smoker. A value of 1 denotes a current smoker, while 0 represents either a former smoker or someone who has never smoked.

feature.name: months_to_death_or_last_record_date
feature.description: The number of months between the reference time point and the patient’s date of death (if known); otherwise, the number of months between the reference time point and the last known date of recorded activity related to the patient.

feature.name: deceased_in_12_months
feature.description: Mortality recorded within the 12 months following the reference time point.

feature.name: deceased_in_24_months
feature.description: Mortality recorded within the 24 months following the reference time point.

feature.name: deceased_in_36_months
feature.description: Mortality recorded within the 36 months following the reference time point.

feature.name: deceased_in_48_months
feature.description: Mortality recorded within the 48 months following the reference time point.

combinedFeature.name: maggic_total_score
combinedFeature.description: Sum of MAGGIC points incl. SBP×EF and Age×EF extras.

valueExpr.path: iif(%gndr.exists(), iif(%gndr = 'male', 1, 0), {}) + iif(%nyha.exists(), iif(%nyha = 'LA28404-4', 0, iif(%nyha = 'LA28405-1', 2, iif(%nyha = 'LA28406-9', 6, iif(%nyha = 'LA28407-7', 8, 0)))), {}) + iif(%smk.exists(), iif((%smk = '1') or (%smk = true), 1, 0), {}) + iif(%dia.exists(), iif(%dia, 3, 0), {}) + iif(%hf18.exists(), iif(%hf18, 2, 0), {}) + iif(%bb.exists(), iif(%bb = true, 0, 3), {}) + iif(%ace.exists(), iif(%ace = true, 0, 1), {}) + iif(%bmi.exists(), iif(%bmi < 15, 6, iif(%bmi < 20, 5, iif(%bmi < 25, 3, iif(%bmi < 30, 2, 0)))), {}) + iif(%copd.exists(), iif(%copd, 2, 0), {}) + iif(%cr.exists(), iif(%cr < 10.1808, 0, iif(%cr < 12.4432, 1, iif(%cr < 14.7056, 2, iif(%cr < 16.968, 3, iif(%cr < 19.2304, 4, iif(%cr < 23.7552, 5, iif(%cr < 28.28, 6, 8))))))), {}) + iif(%lvef.exists(), iif(%lvef < 20, 7, iif(%lvef < 25, 6, iif(%lvef < 30, 5, iif(%lvef < 35, 3, iif(%lvef < 40, 2, 0))))), {}) + iif(%age.exists() and %lvef.exists(), iif(%lvef < 30, iif(%age < 55, 0, iif(%age < 60, 1, iif(%age < 65, 2, iif(%age < 70, 4, iif(%age < 75, 6, iif(%age < 80, 8, 10)))))), iif(%lvef < 40, iif(%age < 55, 0, iif(%age < 60, 2, iif(%age < 65, 4, iif(%age < 70, 6, iif(%age < 75, 8, iif(%age < 80, 10, 13)))))), iif(%age < 55, 0, iif(%age < 60, 3, iif(%age < 65, 5, iif(%age < 70, 7, iif(%age < 75, 9, iif(%age < 80, 12, 15)))))))), {}) + iif(%sbp.exists() and %lvef.exists(), iif(%lvef < 30, iif(%sbp < 110, 5, iif(%sbp < 120, 4, iif(%sbp < 130, 3, iif(%sbp < 140, 2, iif(%sbp < 150, 1, 0))))), iif(%lvef < 40, iif(%sbp < 110, 3, iif(%sbp < 120, 2, iif(%sbp < 130, 1, iif(%sbp < 140, 1, 0)))), iif(%sbp < 110, 2, iif(%sbp < 120, 1, iif(%sbp < 130, 1, 0))))), {})

combinedFeature.name: cancer_history
combinedFeature.description:
Represents the cumulative count of cancer indicators across three cancers:
Lung malignant neoplasm
Secondary malignant neoplasm of the lung
Secondary malignant neoplasm of the bone marrow
The value is an integer (0–3) reflecting how many of these conditions are present for a patient.

combinedFeature.name: beta_blockers_acei_arb
combinedFeature.description:
Captures the combined usage count of two medication classes:
ACE inhibitors/ARBs
Beta blockers
The value is an integer (0–2) indicating whether one or both therapies are in use.
